reviews.name: KAM
reviews.text: Used Tedi to plaster our ceiling then last minute decided we wanted our walls doing too. Tedi was so accommodating and absolutely amazing with his recommendations. Came early and completed the work in the days he said. Would definitely use him again.

reviews.name: Mithel
reviews.text: Tedi was fantastic. Professional, friendly, punctual and highly skilled. Plastered all of the walls and the ceiling in my living room, plus the awkward wall going up the stairs. His work turned out absolutely fantastic. Highly recommend and will have him back.

reviews.name: David
reviews.text: Hardworking and reliable. Arrived on time and completed all tasks to a high standard. Overboarded the kitchen ceiling, skimmed the walls and ceilings in the kitchen, hallway, and landing. Quality of work and attention to detail were excellent.

reviews.name: Fahreena
reviews.text: Fantastic. Excellent communication beforehand, arrived on time, the work was completed quickly and to an excellent standard, and my home was left clean and tidy. Would definitely use again.

reviews.name: Tracey
reviews.text: Very good job. Arrived on time and left everything neat and tidy.

reviews.name: Anthony
reviews.text: What an amazing job by Tedi. Quick to quote and very reasonable, didn't rush the job and was perfection. Would recommend to anyone and will use him again when needed.

reviews.name: Jessica
reviews.text: Great work by Tedi. Fast quote, fair price, and excellent results. Everything was done to a high standard. Would definitely recommend.

aboutText: Tedi Stancioiu has been plastering across the Midlands since 2013. Self-employed and personally on every job, TIS Plastering works with major house builders and developers as well as domestic clients, delivering skimmed, rendered and boarded finishes built to last.
notes: Owner is Tedi (Tedi Stancioiu). Established 2013. Specialist plasterer, does domestic + developer work. Use a distinctive terracotta accent inspired by fresh plaster colour, NOT the usual warm cream + Fraunces palette. Dark modern charcoal background with Space Grotesk/Inter.
